settings.heading: Shipping information
settings.content:
All orders are expertly packaged, prepared, and shipped within 1-3 days of ordering. Please note that each of our bracelets are custom and handmade, and take us some time to create and package each order.

We offer Fast Shipping Worldwide and the typical delivery timeframe is 3-12 days. Depending on your location, you may receive items later or earlier.

All orders are shipped with the tracking number so you can track them every step of the way! Occasionally, packages may face delays beyond our control, such as customs or postal delays so please kindly understand. 

If you have any issues tracking your order, please reach out to us at 'support@oribask.com'

settings.heading: 30-Day Money Back Guarantee
settings.content: We think that our products make a difference in people's lives, and we stand behind them completely. All of our items come with a 30-day money-back guarantee. We will do everything we can to ensure you have a positive experience with Oribask!

settings.heading: How long does the eternal rose last?
settings.row_content:
We use a special preservation process on the eternal roses that replaces the natural sap of the rose with a solution that maintains the rose's color, texture, and beauty.

The lifespan of your eternal rose can vary depending on environmental factors - it is possible to preserve your eternal rose for an indefinite amount of time if it is well taken care of (Should last at least 3 years, and can last significantly longer).

Here are some tips to make sure your eternal rose lasts:

- 1. Keep it out of direct sunlight: It's best to keep your eternal rose in a cool, shaded area of your home.

- 2. Avoid exposure to moisture: Water can cause the petals of the rose to become discolored or even moldy. Keep your eternal rose away from humid areas, and do not attempt to water it.

- 3. Handle it gently: While an eternal rose is sturdy, it can still be damaged if handled roughly. Avoid touching the petals or stem too much, and be careful when moving it from place to place.

- 4. Keep it in the display case: An eternal rose can be kept in a display case (with the top on) to protect it from dust and other environmental factors.

settings.heading: Do I need to water or maintain the rose?
settings.row_content:
Nope! You do not need to water or maintain the rose in our eternal rose box. We have developed a special preservation process that keeps the rose looking fresh and vibrant without any need for maintenance.

Our eternal rose boxes are designed to provide you with a hassle-free and long-lasting display of beauty, allowing you to enjoy the elegance of the rose without the worry of upkeep.

settings.heading: Is the ring adjustable?
settings.row_content: Yes, the ring included in our rose box is adjustable, making it to fit any ring size.

settings.heading: What's all included?
settings.row_content:
Each order includes a carefully curated Oribask box that includes a gift bag, a specially preserved eternal rose, and a 925 sterling silver ring.

Your rose box box will arrive neatly packaged and ready to be gifted.
